qa_pairs.question: What CUDA version is required for running simulations on A100 GPUs installed on Narval?
qa_pairs.answer: CUDA 11.4 is required for running simulations on A100 GPUs installed on Narval.

qa_pairs.question: Which MD programs are available in CPU-only Amber 20 modules?
qa_pairs.answer: CPU-only modules provide all MD programs available in AmberTools/20, along with `pmemd` (serial) and `pmemd.MPI` (parallel).

qa_pairs.question: What additional molecular dynamics (MD) programs do GPU Amber modules include?
qa_pairs.answer: GPU modules add `pmemd.cuda` for single GPU simulations and `pmemd.cuda.MPI` for multi-GPU simulations.
